en: This book was bought yesterday.
This bridge was built 100 years ago.
This letter was written in English.
The window was broken.
This song is liked by many people.

zh: 英语在很多国家被使用。
en: English is spoken in many countries.

zh: 这个问题每天都被讨论。
en: This problem is discussed every day.

zh: 这些苹果是在农场种植的。
en: These apples are grown on a farm.
This letter has not been sent yet.
This building has already been completed.

zh: 这个问题已经被解决了。
en: This problem has already been solved.
That book has already been borrowed.
This road is being repaired.
A new school is being built.
This painting is being restored.
This bridge will be demolished.
New rules will be introduced.

zh: 这个项目将在明年完成。
en: This project will be completed next year.

zh: 这本书必须在周五前还回去。
en: This book must be returned by Friday.

zh: 这个问题应该被认真对待。
en: This problem should be taken seriously.
Who was this letter written by?

zh: 这座桥是什么时候建造的？
en: When was this bridge built?

zh: 这部电影是在哪里拍摄的？
en: Where was this film made?

zh: 这个发明是怎么被发现的？
en: How was this invention discovered?

zh: 这个消息是被谁传出去的？
en: By whom was this news spread?
He was praised by the teacher.
She was chosen as the class monitor.
They were invited to the party.

zh: 这个消息让我们感到惊讶。
en: We were surprised by the news.

zh: 孩子们被这个故事深深吸引了。
en: The children were deeply attracted by the story.
